nasb.text: Guard, through the Holy Spirit who dwells in us, the treasure which has been entrusted to you.

esv.text: By the Holy Spirit who dwells within us, guard the good deposit entrusted to you.

cnv.text: 又要靠著那住在我們裡面的聖靈，保守所交託你的善道。

ccb.text: 要靠着住在我们里面的圣灵牢牢守住交托给你的美善之道。

csbs.text: 你要藉着住在我们里面的圣灵，保守那所受的美好托付。
